data.body:
DRY RUN of the plan-review gate (epic 5fd2 messy-moose-jig) applied to the Workflow-engine-v2 epic (e6d9 hump-seam-spice). Ran the validated three-pass harness (docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/harnesses/three_pass.py) end-to-end: DET floor (check-ac pass/8 lines, clarity pass/score 7) -> Pass-1 Opus full v8 rubric (31 criteria, all overlays forced on, ISF skipped: no session-log link), facet-chunked, +10 agentic finders grepping the real rebar repo; full child bodies fed for G3/G4 -> Pass-2 independent Sonnet verifier (agentic re-grounding for codebase findings) -> Pass-3 deterministic gate.

RESULT: 39 Pass-1 findings -> 33 advisory, 6 dropped, 0 block (v1 posture: only the DET floor blocks; DET floor passed). No structural defect; the gate would CERTIFY (process-followed, no red-flag).

TOP CONVERGENT THEME (5 criteria found it independently — strongest signal): the Burr concurrency tripwire. executor.py docstring names tests/unit/workflow/test_executor_tripwire.py which fails if asyncio/concurrent.futures/threading is imported; bounded-concurrent fan-out (story 8d8e) WILL import one and break that test, but no child enumerates updating it. Surfaced by G1G2 (conf .71, names the exact file), A1, E4, G6, COH/G4 (dbc6 'tripwire intact' vs 8d8e 'relax tripwire' with no sequencing edge). Codebase claims verified real.

OTHER MAJOR ADVISORIES: (T3/T1/T8) Anthropic NativeOutput-via-PydanticAI unverified — runtime POC used PromptedOutput (fallback), backing research doc flags it unresolved, AC bans ToolOutput -> layer-1 may have no valid Anthropic path; (T8 critical) RunState has only 3 fields — no loop-frame/iteration spec carried from the POC, per-step PromptedOutput-vs-ToolOutput selection has no IR field; (F1/E2/E6) 'parity'/structured-output-eval/trace-fidelity lack measurable pass thresholds; (T4/T9/T12 critical) old WORKFLOW_STEP events vs new iteration-keyed reducer slot coexistence/migration unaddressed; (A1) near-complete v1 workflow pkg already exists (schema/lint/executor/runs/migrate) -> NIH risk if rebuilt vs extended.

GATE-BEHAVIOR OBSERVATION: Pass-3 DROPPED A1 (conf .29) and E4 (conf .29) agentic findings despite being substantively excellent — the verifier marked them down because the AC already says 'tripwire relaxed NARROWLY (recorded)', so the vague 'plan ignores the tripwire' framing failed evidence_entails_finding/no_existing_mitigation while the PRECISE G1G2 version (names the test file) survived at .71. Three-pass filter working as designed. Raw: tmp/dryrun_hump_seam_spice.json. This was a DRY RUN (no permanent workflow built).
